steps.title: Locate Verdi's method
steps.content: The passage says Verdi added more horns, trombones, and tubas to the orchestra. It then explains that with more instruments playing at the same time, the orchestra could play extremely loudly.

steps.title: Remove unsupported methods
steps.content: Choice A mentions moving performances indoors, which the passage never attributes to Verdi. Choice C mentions concert hall echoes, also absent from the text. Choice D invents special training for singers. The answer is B.
